name: Antal Doráti
abstract: Antal Doráti (UK: , US: , Hungarian: [ˈɒntɒl ˈdoraːti]; 9 April 1906 – 13 November 1988) was a Hungarian-born conductor and composer who became a naturalized American citizen in 1943.

about_quotes.speaker: Harold Danko
about_quotes.evidence: the one that I got originally was Antal Dorati, the Minneapolis Symphony.
about_quotes.doc_title: Harold Danko interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, April 28, 2021
